{{- /* On a translated (non-default-language) page, show a notice when the primary-language original was modified more recently - i.e. this translation may be stale - with a link to the original. "More recently" compares .Lastmod (front-matter lastmod/date, or git commit date when enableGitInfo is on). Renders nothing on primary-language pages or when up to date. */ -}} {{- $primary := index hugo.Sites 0 -}} {{- if ne site.Language.Lang $primary.Language.Lang -}} {{- $orig := "" -}} {{- range .AllTranslations -}} {{- if eq .Language.Lang $primary.Language.Lang -}}{{- $orig = . -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- with $orig -}} {{- if .Lastmod.After $.Lastmod -}}
{{ partial "icon.html" "alert-triangle" }}

{{ i18n "translation_outdated_title" }}

{{ i18n "translation_outdated_body" }} {{ i18n "translation_view_primary" }} ({{ .Language.Label }}) →

{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}}
